decisions: 2026-03-21: 1 PRD — Plugin singleton, lifecycle hooks, activation defaults, cron registration, uninstall cleanup
2026-03-21: No custom database tables — all storage is wp_options and post meta
2026-03-21: Activation uses add_option (not update_option) to preserve existing values on reactivation
2026-03-21: Uninstall retains generated posts — only removes plugin options, meta, and transients
